targets.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT 
       p.CollectDate as time
     , i.ServerName
     , CONVERT(decimal(38, 2), (100 * (CONVERT(decimal(38, 2), p.CounterValue) / CONVERT(decimal(38, 2), b.CounterValue)))) USE_PCT
  FROM META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
     , TBL2_M_Perfmon p with (nolock)
     , TBL2_M_Perfmon b with (nolock)
 WHERE i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID 
      -- grafana utc issue
      -- solution : 
      -- 1. use default utc
      -- 2. use noraml time arg
      -- 3. use query option -> time shift -> 0d+9h
   AND p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
   AND ServerName IN ($ServerName)
   AND p.CounterName = 'Buffer Manager\Buffer cache hit ratio'
   AND b.CounterName = 'Buffer Manager\Buffer cache hit ratio base'
   and p.CollectDate = b.CollectDate
   and i.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
order by time

SELECT DISTINCT 
       p.CollectDate as time
     , i.ServerName
     , CONVERT(decimal(38, 2), (100 * (CONVERT(decimal(38, 2), p.CounterValue) / CONVERT(decimal(38, 2), b.CounterValue)))) USE_PCT
  FROM META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
     , TBL2_M_Perfmon p with (nolock)
     , TBL2_M_Perfmon b with (nolock)
 WHERE i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID 
      -- grafana utc issue
      -- solution : 
      -- 1. use default utc
      -- 2. use noraml time arg
      -- 3. use query option -> time shift -> 0d+9h
   AND p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
   AND ServerName IN ($ServerName)
   AND p.CounterName = 'Buffer Manager\Buffer cache hit ratio'
   AND b.CounterName = 'Buffer Manager\Buffer cache hit ratio base'
   and p.CollectDate = b.CollectDate
   and i.InstanceID = b.InstanceID
order by time
